name: NEOLEUKIN THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: NEOLEUKIN THERAPEUTICS INC is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing immunotherapies for cancer, autoimmune, and inflammatory disorders. They are headquartered in Emeryville, California and their lead product candidate is a novel recombinant IL-2/IL-15 agonist designed to selectively activate and expand specific immune cell populations to fight disease. The company aims to improve upon existing IL-2 therapies with potentially enhanced safety and efficacy.
